title: AI-ready series metadata record (v0.2)
description: Executable form of the AI-ready series profile (docs/conformance/ai-ready-series-profile.md). A conformant series metadata record validates against this schema; the published reference implementation (Govviz) self-certifies every record against it as a build gate.

description.description: Disambiguating description — must let a consumer tell this measure from a similar one

geography.description: ONS statistical-geography code, or null when not cleanly mappable

periodicity.description: ISO 8601 duration, e.g. P1Y, P3M, P1M

validRange.description: Published plausible-range guard — a consumer rejects values outside it. May be absent on derived ratios or a local build without fetched data.

compiler.description: Downstream compiler metadata. This distinguishes Govviz's reference rendering from the primary producer.

upstreamConformance.description: Whether the primary producer asserts this AI-ready profile upstream.

nextRelease.description: Official next release date only when known from a source-specific release calendar; otherwise null. Do not use this for compiler estimates.

nextReleaseEstimated.description: Backward-compatible flag for older records; false when nextRelease is null.

latestObservedPeriod.description: Latest period observed in the emitted tidy data file.

latestFetchedAt.description: Compiler-side timestamp/date for the latest upstream fetch evidence.

estimatedNextPeriod.description: Compiler-side cadence projection from the latest observed period; not an official release date.

conformanceLevel.description: Govviz reference-rendering conformance level, not an upstream producer score.

limitations.description: Human-readable caveats that prevent overclaiming upstream or official conformance.

latest.description: Stable pointer to the current data file

semanticTags.description: Recommended discovery tags for policy problems, missions, themes, units and departments.

subjectUris.description: Recommended stable identifiers for departments, geographies, source pages or concepts.

qualityDimensions.description: Recommended Government Data Quality Framework dimensions. Warning-level for downstream compilers; primary publishers own authoritative quality claims.

dataSteward.description: Recommended upstream data steward; usually primary-publisher supplied.

contact.description: Recommended source contact or feedback route.

legalBasis.description: Recommended legal/public-task basis where asserted by the publisher.

riskOwner.description: Recommended owner of misuse, interpretation or operational risk.

qualityOwner.description: Recommended owner of upstream quality assurance.

relatedSeries.description: Recommended links to numerator, denominator or comparable series.

machineUseRestrictions.description: Recommended machine-use constraints beyond the licence, if any.
